subject: Son Goku (Dragon Ball Super) — anime IP character, mid-action running pose, orange gi
description: A male martial artist in an orange and blue gi runs toward the viewer at mid-shot framing, fists clenched at his sides and a broad grin on his face. His spiky dark hair is unaltered (base form). The background erupts in golden-yellow energy streaks and light bursts radiating outward, suggesting intense ki output. The overall impression is forward momentum and cheerful combat readiness.
foreground: Male martial artist in orange gi with blue belt, running forward, grinning, fists ready
background: Explosive golden-yellow ki energy bursts and radial light streaks on a warm amber field
